Valentine’s Day Email Promotion #1		                            Copyright Free Template



SUBJECT:  My Valentine’s gift to you



First of all, Happy Valentine’s Day!  



I’m sure you’re rarin’ to spend an excellent time

with your significant other on February 14th, but I want to 

give you an offer you’ll love.



[insert offer] 



Why are we doing this? Because we love you and 

we want to do something special for you. 



[Insert more benefits about the offer and the transformation they’ll get]



And remember, chocolates melt and flowers die

but this special will live forever. 



But remember, this offer comes down at [insert deadline]

so you better take action right now. 



Talk soon!



(insert name)



P.S.  Do you have other people you’d like to share this

offer with? It will make the perfect Valentine’s gift, I 

promise. 



Feel free to Tweet, post this on Facebook, and Instagram

And spread the love with the special deal.  



You can find all about it here:  [insert link to offer]
